channel.title: Budget on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Budget on RaihnForge

item.title: Project Charter v2: Nurse Workstation Refresh — Phase 1
item.description:
Notional client project. “Central Medical Center” and “Dr. Phylicia Patterson” are fictional names from the assignment brief. The project mechanics, schedule, budget, risk register, and management language below are my own applied work, presented here lightly edited from the ADMG 474 second-revision charter. The signature block at the bottom is preserved to show the chartering pattern.

Executive Summary

Central Medical Center is a facility with the highest expectation of quality and concern for our community and patients. Recently it has become apparent that our technology for staff and clients is running the risk of failing to meet our organizational vision, values, and mission. For this reason, the initiative to refresh all technology in the facility has been enacted. This first phase of the technology refresh will set the tone for the following stages and bring the organization in line ethically while curtailing future time and cost expenditures.
